positive: A stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic forest scene. The main subject features bioluminescent, stylized flora and fauna integrated within a deep space environment. Central composition with strong silhouettes and high contrast. The color palette should be deep indigo, ethereal teal, vibrant magenta, and luminous gold accents. Focus on clean, bold lines, geometric shapes, and symmetry suitable for screen printing on apparel. The forest should recede into a nebula backdrop, creating a sense of depth and wonder. Graphic novel aesthetic, flat design, highly detailed, perfect for t-shirt print.
